eligible_applicant_type: Mixed or lower income housing organizations
project_area: Arts and cultural programming and services that celebrate and bring together diverse neighborhood cultures, with a focus on under-served populations, mental health, youth, seniors, hospitals, and mixed or lower income housing.
demographic_requirements: Projects should serve under-served populations, mental health programs, youth, seniors, hospitals, and mixed or lower income housing. Priority is given to projects that align with the Cultural Equity Plan and promote diversity, equity, inclusion, and justice.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofit organizations, individual artists, community groups, mental health programs, youth/senior programs, hospitals, and mixed or lower income housing organizations within New Haven. For-profit entities are ineligible. Applicants must not have received awards in consecutive years for the same project unless proposing a new or existing project that has not yet received funding. The City of New Haven cannot be the sole funder of a project; applicants must seek additional support (including in-kind contributions not exceeding 50% of other support).
